Full PPE is mandatory for all workers on every site at all times.
Safety harnesses and belts are compulsory for all work at height above 2 metres.
A site safety briefing is conducted at the start of every new project.
All chemicals and coating materials are handled per the manufacturer safety data sheets (SDS).
No work begins without a proper surface inspection and a safety risk assessment.
Scaffolding and access equipment are inspected daily before use.
Emergency contact numbers and first aid equipment are available on every site.
Zero tolerance policy for any safety violation — work stops immediately if a violation is observed.
